mapper.select: WITH RECURSIVE menu_tree AS ( SELECT m.* FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.menu_type IN ('M', 'C') AND m.status = 1 AND m.deleted = 0 UNION ALL SELECT m.* FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN menu_tree t ON m.id = t.parent_id WHERE m.deleted = 0 ) SELECT DISTINCT * FROM menu_tree ORDER BY parent_id, order_num

SELECT DISTINCT m.perms FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.perms IS NOT NULL AND m.perms != '' AND m.status = 1 AND m.deleted = 0
